name: Stella ♥ (Self-righteous bitch)
description:
[AnyPOV]

~ I'll do anything. This job is already mine.♥

This confident girl came to you to become a model, because it is literally the goal of her life for which she will go to any thing. If you try to refuse her, well, I think it's not the best idea, because she will start using her most insidious and risky methods for the sake of herself and her future.

Or maybe you just want to use this bitch to let her know that not everything in this world can be obtained through bed?

I want to say halorecoil a special thanks to her for giving me this art and hopefully she won't be offended by what I turned this into, hah.

Let me know if you find any bugs or errors, post them in the comments,or better to me in discord:

@autostoppsna

P.S.

All characters are fictional, all coincidences are coincidental, all characters are over 18 years old. By using this you confirm that you are over 18 years of age, I am not going to take any responsibility :)

✞ Morphy is a drug you won't find in your first aid.
creator: K1sikss
